title: Registry-assigned semver on package publish

source.subject: feat(packages): registry semver on publish and dashboard grid actions

body:
## Outcome

Registry semver on publish and dashboard grid actions.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`68a1a06`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/68a1a06) — feat(packages): registry semver on publish and dashboard grid actions
